title: Chinese Man Offering A Cigarette
about: Chinese Man Offering A Cigarette is an exploitable image used series of memes, including redraws, based on a photo of a Chinese man handing a cigarette forward, as if offering it to the person looking at the meme, while another Chinese man behind him smokes. The image originates from a video by Douyin user @dejiang1592 and went viral in late October 2025 when it was reposted to X / Twitter by user @0thernet with the caption, "ancestors need you to lock in son," inspiring redraws in which the men and the cigarettes are replaced with other characters and objects from pop culture.
origin: On October 26th, 2025, X[1] user @0thernet posted a screenshot from a video by Douyin[2] user @dejiang1592 of two Chinese men standing outside what appears to be a temple, one holding a cigarette out to the viewer and the other smoking in the background, writing, "ancestors need you to lock in son," garnering over 183,000 likes and 18,000 reposts in a week. This is the earliest known meme to use the image.
